g_fam

/* Do not edit. This file is generated from g_fam.tbaf. Make your changes there and regenerate this file. */

IF
  G("g_FamJumpToPack", 1)
  OR(2)
    !CombatCounterLT(1)
    See([EVILCUTOFF])
  !Dead("%death_var%")
THEN
  RESPONSE #100
    MoveToObject(Player1)
    GiveItemCreate("%fam_item%", Player1, 0, 0, 0)
    DestroySelf()
END

IF
  G("g_FamJumpToPack", 2)
  HPPercentLT(Myself, 70)
  OR(2)
    !CombatCounterLT(1)
    See([EVILCUTOFF])
  !Dead("%death_var%")
THEN
  RESPONSE #100
    DisplayStringHead(Myself, @603)
    ApplySpellRES("G_FSPED2", Myself)
    MoveToObject(Player1)
    GiveItemCreate("%fam_item%", Player1, 0, 0, 0)
    DestroySelf()
END

END

IF
  G("g_FamHitAndRun", 1)
  !Dead("%death_var%")
  AttackedBy([EVILCUTOFF], DEFAULT)
THEN
  RESPONSE #100
    ApplySpellRES("G_FSPED2", Myself)
    RunAwayFrom(LastAttackerOf(Myself), 45)
    AttackOneRound(LastTargetedBy(Myself))
END

IF
  ActionListEmpty()
  See([EVILCUTOFF])
  G("g_FamTactic", 2)
  !Dead("%death_var%")
  !ModalState(STEALTH)
  !StateCheck(Myself, STATE_INVISIBLE)
  OR(4)
    See(NearestEnemyOfType([0.GENERAL_ITEM.0.MAGE_ALL]))
    See(NearestEnemyOfType([0.GENERAL_ITEM.0.CLERIC_ALL]))
    See(NearestEnemyOfType([0.GENERAL_ITEM.0.DRUID_ALL]))
    See(NearestEnemyOfType([0.GENERAL_ITEM.0.BARD_ALL]))
THEN
  RESPONSE #100
    AttackReevaluate(LastSeenBy(Myself), 30)
END

  !Dead("%death_var%")
  !ModalState(STEALTH)
  !StateCheck(Myself, STATE_INVISIBLE)
THEN

IF
  HasItemSlot(Player1, SLOT_MISC18)
  HasItemSlot(Player1, SLOT_MISC17)
  HasItemSlot(Player1, SLOT_MISC16)
  HasItemSlot(Player1, SLOT_MISC15)
  HasItemSlot(Player1, SLOT_MISC14)
  HasItemSlot(Player1, SLOT_MISC13)
  HasItemSlot(Player1, SLOT_MISC12)
  HasItemSlot(Player1, SLOT_MISC11)
  HasItemSlot(Player1, SLOT_MISC10)
  HasItemSlot(Player1, SLOT_MISC9)
  HasItemSlot(Player1, SLOT_MISC8)
  HasItemSlot(Player1, SLOT_MISC7)
  HasItemSlot(Player1, SLOT_MISC6)
  HasItemSlot(Player1, SLOT_MISC5)
  HasItemSlot(Player1, SLOT_MISC4)
  HasItemSlot(Player1, SLOT_MISC3)
  G("g_FamInventoryFull", 0)
  !Dead("%death_var%")
THEN
  RESPONSE #100
    SetGlobal("g_FamInventoryFull", "GLOBAL", 1)
    DisplayStringHead(Myself, @15)
END

  ActionListEmpty()
  CombatCounterLT(1)
  !See([EVILCUTOFF])
  Detect(Player1)

  !Dead("%death_var%")
  GGT("g_FamPickupJewels", 0)

IF
  CombatCounterLT(1)
  !See([EVILCUTOFF])
  !InMyArea(Player1)
  G("g_FamFollowMaster", 1)
  !Dead("%death_var%")
THEN
  RESPONSE #100
    MoveGlobalObject(Myself, Player1)
    Continue()
END

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (comment)
  (block
    if: (if_clause
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (string)
          args: (number)))
      (or_marker
        count: (number))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (number)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (object_ref)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (string))))
    then: (then_clause
      (response
        weight: (number)
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (identifier)))
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (string)
            args: (identifier)
            args: (number)
            args: (number)
            args: (number)))
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier))))))
  (block
    if: (if_clause
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (string)
          args: (number)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)
          args: (number)))
      (or_marker
        count: (number))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (number)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (object_ref)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (string))))
    then: (then_clause
      (response
        weight: (number)
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (identifier)
            args: (tra_ref)))
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (string)
            args: (identifier)))
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (identifier)))
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (string)
            args: (identifier)
            args: (number)
            args: (number)
            args: (number)))
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier))))))
  (block
    if: (if_clause
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (string)
          args: (number)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)
          args: (number)))
      (or_marker

      (condition

          func: (identifier)
          args: (number)))

          func: (identifier)
          args: (object_ref)))
      (condition

          func: (identifier)
          args: (string))))

      (response
        weight: (number)
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (identifier)
            args: (tra_ref)))
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (string)
            args: (identifier)))
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (identifier)))
        (action

            args: (string)
            args: (identifier)
            args: (number)
            args: (number)
            args: (number)))
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier))))))
  (block
    if: (if_clause
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (string)
          args: (number)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (string)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (object_ref)
          args: (identifier))))
    then: (then_clause
      (response
        weight: (number)
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (string)
            args: (identifier)))
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (call_expr
              func: (identifier)
              args: (identifier))
            args: (number)))
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (call_expr
              func: (identifier)
              args: (identifier)))))))
  (block
    if: (if_clause
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (object_ref)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (string)
          args: (number)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (string)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)))
      (or_marker
        count: (number))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (object_ref))))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (object_ref))))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (object_ref))))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (object_ref)))))
    then: (then_clause
      (response
        weight: (number)
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (call_expr
              func: (identifier)
              args: (identifier))
            args: (number))))))
  (block
    if: (if_clause
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (object_ref)))
      (or_marker
        count: (number))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (string)
          args: (number)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (string)
          args: (number)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (string)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)
          args: (identifier))))

        weight: (number)
        (action
          call: (call_expr

            args: (string)))
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (string)))
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier))))))
  (block
    if: (if_clause
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (string)
          args: (number)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (string))))
    then: (then_clause
      (response
        weight: (number)
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (string)
            args: (string)
            args: (number)))
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (identifier)
            args: (tra_ref))))))
  (block
    if: (if_clause
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (number)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (object_ref)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (string)
          args: (number)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (string)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (string)
          args: (number))))
    then: (then_clause
      (response
        weight: (number)
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (string)
            args: (identifier)))
        (action
          call: (call_expr

            args: (string)))

        (action

            args: (string)))
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (string)))
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (string)))
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier))))))
  (block
    if: (if_clause
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (number)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (object_ref)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (string)
          args: (number)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (string))))
    then: (then_clause
      (response
        weight: (number)
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (identifier)
            args: (identifier)))
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)))))))

================================================================================
g_pispy0
================================================================================

// Initial PI spy script.
// Its only purpose is to get clone creature into LastHeard, then pass management to the main script.
IF
  Heard([ANYONE], %g_pnp_pi_shout%)
THEN
  RESPONSE #100
    // DisplayStringHead(Myself, ~spy heard~)
    ChangeAIScript("g_pispy1", OVERRIDE)
    // DisplayStringHead(Myself, ~spy changed~)
END
// IF
//   OnCreation()
// THEN
//   RESPONSE #100
//     DisplayStringHead(Myself, ~spy created~)
// END
// IF
//   True()
// THEN
//   RESPONSE #100
//     DisplayStringHead(Myself, ~spy waiting~)
//     Continue()
// END

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment)
  (block
    if: (if_clause
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (object_ref)
          args: (variable_ref))))
    then: (then_clause
      (response
        weight: (number)
        (line_comment)
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (string)
            args: (identifier)))))
    (line_comment))
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment))

================================================================================
g_pispy1
================================================================================

// Main PI spy script.
// It tracks spells cast by the clone, sets local variables, then removes them one by one and once all is clear, destroys itself.
// The grunt work is APPENDed later in main.tpa

IF
  Global("interrupt_set", "LOCALS", 0)
THEN
  RESPONSE #100
    SetInterrupt(FALSE) // just in case
    SetGlobal("interrupt_set", "LOCALS", 1)
END
IF
  !Exists(LastHeardBy)
  // %final_check_list%
THEN
  RESPONSE #100
    ActionOverride(LastSummonerOf, SetInterrupt(TRUE))
    DestroySelf()
END
// IF
//   True()
// THEN
//   RESPONSE #100
//     DisplayStringHead(LastHeardBy, ~I am projected image~)
//     DisplayStringHead(LastSummonerOf, ~I am original~)
//     DisplayStringHead(Myself, ~pi checking spells~)
//     Continue()
// END

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment)
  (block
    if: (if_clause
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (string)
          args: (string)
          args: (number))))
    then: (then_clause
      (response
        weight: (number)
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (identifier)))
        (line_comment)
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (string)
            args: (string)
            args: (number))))))
  (block
    if: (if_clause
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier))))
    (line_comment)
    then: (then_clause
      (response
        weight: (number)
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (identifier)
            args: (call_expr
              func: (identifier)
              args: (identifier))))
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier))))))
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment))

================================================================================
g_pispy1_spell_block
================================================================================

// Individual spell blocks for each spell.
// Local vars track how many times the spell was cast.
// Some spell ids are too long for a var name, so have to use spell resource instead.

IF
  SpellCast(LastHeardBy, %spell%)
THEN
  RESPONSE #100
    IncrementGlobal("%spell_res%", "LOCALS", 1)
    // DisplayStringHead(Myself, ~Detected cast: %spell%~)
END
IF
  GlobalGT("%spell_res%", "LOCALS", 0)
THEN
  RESPONSE #100
    IncrementGlobal("%spell_res%", "LOCALS", -1)
    ActionOverride(LastSummonerOf, SetInterrupt(FALSE))
    ActionOverride(LastSummonerOf, RemoveSpellRES("%spell_res%"))
    // ActionOverride(LastSummonerOf, DisplayStringHead(Myself, ~Removed %spell_res%~))
END

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment)
  (block
    if: (if_clause
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (identifier)
          args: (variable_ref))))
    then: (then_clause
      (response
        weight: (number)
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (string)
            args: (string)
            args: (number)))))
    (line_comment))
  (block
    if: (if_clause
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (string)
          args: (string)
          args: (number))))
    then: (then_clause
      (response
        weight: (number)
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (string)
            args: (string)
            args: (number)))
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (identifier)
            args: (call_expr
              func: (identifier)
              args: (identifier))))
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (identifier)
            args: (call_expr
              func: (identifier)
              args: (string))))))
    (line_comment)))

================================================================================
g_pnp_pi
================================================================================

// PI clone script. Assigned by projimag.spl.
// Putting anything here will interfere with player commands. So the only thing it does is shout, announcing itself for the spy.

IF
  OnCreation()
THEN
  RESPONSE #100
    GlobalShout(%g_pnp_pi_shout%)
    // DisplayStringHead(Myself, ~pi shouted~)
END

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (line_comment)
  (line_comment)
  (block
    if: (if_clause
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier))))
    then: (then_clause
      (response
        weight: (number)
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (variable_ref)))))
    (line_comment)))

================================================================================
g_simul
================================================================================

IF
  Global("g_clone_type_set", "LOCALS", 0)
  Global("%clone_gvar%", "GLOBAL", 1)
THEN
  RESPONSE #100
    // DisplayStringHead(Myself, ~I am mislead~)
    ReallyForceSpellRES("%mislead_spell%", Myself)
    SetGlobal("g_clone_type_set", "LOCALS", 1)
    SetGlobal("%clone_gvar%", "GLOBAL", 0)
END
IF
  Global("g_clone_type_set", "LOCALS", 0)
  Global("%clone_gvar%", "GLOBAL", 2)
THEN
  RESPONSE #100
    // DisplayStringHead(Myself, ~I am simulacrum~)
    ReallyForceSpellRES("%simulacr_spell%", Myself)
    SetGlobal("g_clone_type_set", "LOCALS", 1)
    SetGlobal("%clone_gvar%", "GLOBAL", 0)
END

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (block
    if: (if_clause
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (string)
          args: (string)
          args: (number)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (string)
          args: (string)
          args: (number))))
    then: (then_clause
      (response
        weight: (number)
        (line_comment)
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (string)
            args: (identifier)))
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (string)
            args: (string)
            args: (number)))
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (string)
            args: (string)
            args: (number))))))
  (block
    if: (if_clause
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (string)
          args: (string)
          args: (number)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (string)
          args: (string)
          args: (number))))
    then: (then_clause
      (response
        weight: (number)
        (line_comment)
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (string)
            args: (identifier)))
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (string)
            args: (string)
            args: (number)))
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)
            args: (string)
            args: (string)
            args: (number)))))))

================================================================================
g_traps2
================================================================================

IF
    ActionListEmpty()
    Delay(5)
THEN
    RESPONSE #100
       DestroySelf()
END

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (block
    if: (if_clause
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)))
      (condition
        call: (call_expr
          func: (identifier)
          args: (number))))
    then: (then_clause
      (response
        weight: (number)
        (action
          call: (call_expr
            func: (identifier)))))))
